hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; params=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); is_git=cmd.lstrip().startswith('git '); sys.exit(0) if not is_git else None; print('BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses pre-commit hooks and is never allowed. Fix the hook failures instead.') if '--no-verify' in cmd else None; sys.exit(2) if '--no-verify' in cmd else None; sys.exit(0) if 'git commit' not in cmd else None; r=subprocess.run(['git','rev-parse','--abbrev-ref','HEAD'],capture_output=True,text=True); branch=r.stdout.strip(); print(f'BLOCKED: direct commits to {branch} are not allowed. Use a feature/* branch.') if branch in ('dev','main') else None; sys.exit(2) if branch in ('dev','main') else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json; params=json.load(sys.stdin); path=params.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.vault_pass','.envrc','vars/vault.yml','.tfvars']; sys.exit(1) if any(b in path for b in blocked) else sys.exit(0)"
file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in */roles/*|*/group_vars/*|*/host_vars/*|*/playbooks/*|*/tasks/*|*/handlers/*|*/defaults/*) ansible-lint "$file" 2>&1 | head -30 ;; esac
